notes: The first repository-relative launcher and baseline commands used an incorrect path and failed; corrected successful fingerprint and baseline commands still preceded describe and every subject edit.

The first Maven baseline attempt ran under Java 25 despite a property override and failed on pre-existing JaCoCo compatibility. It was not used as baseline evidence; JavaSpec baseline 3/3 was already green, and explicit JAVA_HOME Java 21 test and verify later passed 4/4.

The first final dry-run omitted the compiled specification classpath and skipped one example. It still found no pending generation work but was not used as executable evidence; the corrected classpath dry-run passed 1/1 with no pending work.

The seal records both new source files as untracked and therefore has patchSha256 null. Complete describe/generate/edit/file-read/hash events seal their provenance and final bytes; the independently materialized base-to-implementation patch matches those bytes and the implementation commit exactly.
The selected launcher JAR path changed after sealing from SHA-256 0a6affa0... to 293ac11e.... Independent replay passed with the later binary but is not a bit-identical executable replay.
